entryRequirements.visaNote: Many nationalities (UK, EU, US, Australia, etc.) receive visa-on-arrival or visa-free entry for 30-90 days.
entryRequirements.officialSource: The Official Portal of the UAE Government (u.ae)

transportInfo.paymentCard: Nol Card (covers Metro, tram, bus, water bus, and RTA taxis)
transportInfo.note: Nol Card is the single card for essentially all public transport in Dubai — buy at any metro station.

majorEventsNote: Most UAE public holidays are Islamic (Hijri) calendar-based and shift ~11 days earlier each year — exact 2026 dates must be confirmed close to travel, official announcement typically comes only weeks ahead.
